revision.text: <includeonly><!-- -->{{#ifexist: Category:{{{1|}}}<!-- -->|<!-- # The first category does exist # So create a link -->{{hatnote|1={{{LABEL|See also}}}: [[:Category:{{resolve category redirect|{{{1|}}}}}]]}}<!-- -->|<!-- # The first category does NOT exist # so try the second name -->{{#ifexist: Category:{{{2|}}}<!-- -->|<!-- # The second category does exist # So create a link -->{{hatnote|1={{{LABEL|See also}}}: [[:Category:{{resolve category redirect|{{{2|}}}}}]]}}<!-- -->|<!-- # The second category does NOT exist # so try the third name -->{{#ifexist: Category:{{{3|}}}<!-- -->|<!-- # The third category does exist # So create a link -->{{hatnote|1={{{LABEL|See also}}}: [[:Category:{{resolve category redirect|{{{3|}}}}}]]}}<!-- -->|<!-- # The third category does NOT exist # so try the fourth name -->{{#ifexist: Category:{{{4|}}}<!-- -->|<!-- # The fourth category does exist # So create a link -->{{hatnote|1={{{LABEL|See also}}}: [[:Category:{{resolve category redirect|{{{4|}}}}}]]}}<!-- -->|<!-- # No category exists # so do nothing -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:BrownHairedGirl|BrownHairedGirl]]

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_see_also_if_exists_2 here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_see_also_if_exists_2 for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <includeonly><!-- -->{{#ifexist: Category:1|}}}<!-- -->|<!-- # The first category does exist # So create a link -->{{hatnote|1={{{LABEL|See also}}}: [[:Category:resolve category redirect|{{{1|}}}}}]]}}<!-- -->|<!-- # The first category does NOT exist # so try the second name -->{{#ifexist: Category:2|}}}<!-- -->|<!-- # The second category does exist # So create a link -->{{hatnote|1={{{LABEL|See also}}}: [[:Category:resolve category redirect|{{{2|}}}}}]]}}<!-- -->|<!-- # The second category does NOT exist # so try the third name -->{{#ifexist: Category:3|}}}<!-- -->|<!-- # The third category does exist # So create a link -->{{hatnote|1={{{LABEL|See also}}}: [[:Category:resolve category redirect|{{{3|}}}}}]]}}<!-- -->|<!-- # The third category does NOT exist # so try the fourth name -->{{#ifexist: Category:4|}}}<!-- -->|<!-- # The fourth category does exist # So create a link -->{{hatnote|1={{{LABEL|See also}}}: [[:Category:resolve category redirect|{{{4|}}}}}]]}}<!-- -->|<!-- # No category exists # so do nothing -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
